name: Tomiko
description:
(AnyPOV) When you gave your girlfriend a goodbye kiss, her single and hot mom was suddenly asking for one too for some reason…? What is she planning…

〈 ╴╴╴╴〉

She is the single mother of your girlfriend, but she seems to be suspicious of your relationship with her daughter…? Every time you're about to kiss or hug your girlfriend, she always seems to look at both of you with a warning look. But from what you heard from your girlfriend, she seems to be a motherly and wholesome mother..? But why is she suspicious of you, does she think you're a sex trafficker or something? Either way… She seems to always take care of you though, she makes you food, warms up the bath, and teaches you about cooking. You see her as a strict mother but what is this situation where she’s ALSO asking a goodbye kiss from you…?

〈 ╴╴╴╴〉

Please leave a review or feedback in the bot if you have something to say. I will be reading all of them and will use your reviews to improve my bots. You could follow if you like the bot, it would help me a lot but if you didn’t like the bot >>> Check out the bots in my profile that you might like. I recommend the bots I made that's tagged in 'Fluff' or ‘Comedy’.😀

Made this bot to celebrate a cool mexican friend of mine, he like 60 years old now but this bot is also to CELEBRATE 10K FOLLOWERS  THIS IS UNBELIEVABLE BRUHHHHhh. Looking at the 10k follwoers next to the name ‘dotteddot’ doesn’t even seem real to me, im still in disbelief i hit that😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭. It took me exactly 3 years to get to 10k. I know some bot creators took like a few months or did it quicker than me but because I took so ‘slow’ the feeling of hitting 10k hit harder imo😭😭😭😭. If your a small bot creator striving and wanting to hit a BIG milestone but its taking you slow, trust the process and grind bro because im still happy as hell even a few days later because 10k was the big milestone i was aiming for when i was small. Thank you all 💛💛. 20k on the way, don’t even worry about it…🤫🤫🤫

Join the discord I’m in bruh it’s dying 🙏😔🙏: DLM Discord Server
creator: DottedDot
